title: Changzhou, Jiangsu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Changzhou is a city in Jiangsu with a population of 5,278,000. A prosperous city in Jiangsu province, known for its dinosaur theme park, textile industry, and solar energy manufacturing.
